description: Proves the governed disposable build path can handle a non-WPF ASP.NET Core REST API product request with endpoints, DTOs, validation tests, and no game-specific scope reuse.

params.goal: i want build tiny rest api

boundary: Loop-gated disposable build only. Generated ASP.NET Core REST API files must stay in the disposable workspace; run-scoped docs are evidence only; no accepted memory mutation, ticket acceptance, real repo writes, guardrail mutation, or self-approval.
